name: Custom Order Labels
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Custom Order Labels","bold":true},{"text":" allow merchants to create and classify unique labels for specific order workflows. This enables them to undertake particular tasks on custom-tagged orders, thereby helping them manage such order requests and communicate their statuses with customers in an efficient manner."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Creating a Custom Order Label"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Follow the steps shown below to create a new order label:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"To create unique order labels, you must visit "},{"text":"Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":" from the Navigation panel and select "},{"text":"All Settings & order:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once you’ve created your custom order labels, visit the orders section from the Navigation panel via "},{"text":"Sales Order","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"»","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"View Orders","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GY5SMAEN1XD2/ordlabel5.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GY5SMAEN1XD2/ordlabel5.png","name":"ordlabel5.png","type":"image/png","size":302009,"width":2848,"height":1186,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FGY5SMAEN1XD2%2Fordlabel5.png","active":true,"mediaID":2140,"dateInserted":"2026-02-03T08:07:49+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You Additionally, you can filter orders that have a custom label for your convenience."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ZXVK9HGBLXPP/ordlabel6.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ZXVK9HGBLXPP/ordlabel6.png","name":"ordlabel6.png","type":"image/png","size":431204,"width":2848,"height":1368,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FZXVK9HGBLXPP%2Fordlabel6.png","active":true,"mediaID":2141,"dateInserted":"2026-02-03T08:08:05+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Otherwise, you can select the checkboxes next to the order IDs and use the "},{"text":"Bulk Action","bold":true},{"text":" functionality to assign the labels in one go."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/H9NOT9PFU5ZQ/ordlabel7.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/H9NOT9PFU5ZQ/ordlabel7.png","name":"ordlabel7.png","type":"image/png","size":180314,"width":2848,"height":743,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FH9NOT9PFU5ZQ%2Fordlabel7.png","active":true,"mediaID":2142,"dateInserted":"2026-02-03T08:08:30+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"toggle","children":[{"type":"toggle-heading","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Things to remember while assigning custom order labels:"}]}]},{"type":"toggle-content","children":[{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can assign only one custom label per order."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The custom order label does not replace the existing order fulfillment status. It's instead added alongside it."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Orders with a custom label will not be displayed when filtering order lists using the default order statuses. This helps to exclude orders with a default standard status from a custom one."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Orders filtered with a custom label typically don't display \""},{"text":"Cancelled","bold":true},{"text":"\" or \""},{"text":"Dispatched","bold":true},{"text":"\" orders, as they normally don't require any actions from the merchant's standpoint."}]}]}]}]}],"isExpanded":true},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Display Custom Labels to Customers"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can check our Neto by Maropost documentation, "},{"type":"a","url":"https://developers.maropost.com/documentation/neto-by-maropost-developer-documentation/tweak-documents/generic/add-custom-order-label-support/","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Add Custom Order Label Support","bold":true}]},{"text":", which explains how to modify your theme templates to display custom labels on your customer-facing webstore."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Exciting New Feature Alert!","bold":true}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"We're thrilled to introduce this latest enhancement to your Neto experience! Your insights are invaluable as we continue refining this feature. Have ideas to make it even better?
